summary: A talking-head PSA in which HSI's Robert Lombardi speaks to camera in front of a Cyber Crimes Center (C3) backdrop, warning parents that online predators target children over the holidays and directing viewers to ice.gov/sextortion. It is a single-speaker spoken interview with captions, not a music-driven cinematic or genre spectacle, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: ROBERT LOMBARDI – Homeland Security Investigations; CYBER CRIMES CENTER C3; ice.gov/sextortion
